/Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Toolchains/XcodeDefault.xctoolchain/usr/bin/cc -O3 -DNDEBUG -isysroot /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX26.2.sdk -nostdlib -Xlinker --script=/Users/edouardtouch/pico-sdk/src/rp2350/boot_stage2/boot_stage2.ld -Xlinker -Map=/Users/edouardtouch/Phob/PhobGCC-SW/PhobGCC/rp2040/build-rp2350/pico-sdk/src/rp2350/boot_stage2/bs2_default.elf.map CMakeFiles/bs2_default.dir/compile_time_choice.S.o -o bs2_default.elf
